addition.item: Optional "Leave a review" button with an automatically generated Place ID link and an administrator-provided URL override.

Per-breakpoint responsive columns: choose 1 to 6 columns independently for mobile, tablet, desktop, and wide screens. Applies to the Bootstrap layouts (Default, Card Carousel, Compact) and the UIkit slider layouts (UIkit Default, UIkit Compact).
Configurable autoplay interval (1-60 seconds). The setting is hidden unless autoplay is enabled.
Italian translation.

change.item: The Bootstrap carousel has been rebuilt on native CSS scroll-snap. Touch swipe is native, the previous/next buttons advance one column at a time, and the carousel stays usable as a scrollable row when JavaScript is unavailable. Column counts are applied with CSP-safe utility classes (no inline styles).
The UIkit layouts keep their native uk-slider but now honour the per-breakpoint column and autoplay-interval settings (using UIkit's own breakpoints).

note.item: Breaking change: the Bootstrap carousel markup and CSS classes have changed (the old .carousel / .carousel-item structure is replaced by .prettyreviews-track / .prettyreviews-slide with pr-cols-* column utilities). Re-copy any template overrides of the Default, Card Carousel, or Compact layouts, and update custom CSS that targeted the old classes.

addition.item: Review language setting: choose which language Google returns review text in, or leave it on "Use site default" to follow the website language.
Purge Reviews button: remove all stored reviews for a module from its admin settings (CSRF- and permission-protected, with a confirmation prompt).

fix.item: Reviews are no longer always fetched in Dutch — the hardcoded language has been replaced by the new setting.

addition.item: First release of Pretty Reviews.

fix.item: Fix bug with ajax request in Joomla 5

changelog.addition: Option to limit amount of reviews to be displayed
Option to display reviews by newest or random.
Option to hide reviews without text.

fix.item: Added missing license in php file

addition.item: Option to limit amount of reviews to be displayed
Option to display reviews by newest or random.
Option to hide reviews without text.

fix.item: Made the module fetching more robust with fallback

addition.item: Joomla 6 compatibility

fix.item: Language constant for "View all reviews" instead of hardcoded Dutch. Ouch!

addition.item: German Translation
Added UIkit/YOOtheme-compatible default, list, and compact layouts.
Added French language files.

change.item: Adjusted the German relative-date suffix for the current time-ago output format.
Joomla 6 compliance pass: helper methods are used through instances and review dates are prepared in the dispatcher before layout rendering.
Admin refresh button and JavaScript feedback now use Joomla language strings.
Installer script and service provider signatures were modernized without requiring strict types.
Fixed the legacy "Overall rating" language key and removed the old singular "View all reviews" key usage.

addition.item: Four layout templates: default (carousel), card-carousel, list, and compact (sidebar/footer).
Legacy layout preserved as tmpl/legacy.php for users with existing template overrides.
Display settings tab: autoplay toggle, show/hide rating summary, review count, profile photos, review date, "View all reviews" button.
Review text truncation: configurable maximum character limit (default 250).
Load layout CSS toggle: opt-out of the built-in stylesheet per module instance.
CSS grid stacking fix for carousel height jumping between slides of different text lengths.
Layout field moved from Advanced tab to Display tab in module settings.
Empty-state language string (MOD_PRETTYREVIEWS_NO_REVIEWS) shown when no reviews are available.
Accessible star-rating aria-labels via MOD_PRETTYREVIEWS_RATING_ARIA.

security.item: AJAX refresh endpoint now requires the Joomla CSRF form token (POST) and a per-module core.edit permission check.
Google API key, Place ID and review-sort are no longer rendered as data-* attributes or sent in the request URL — credentials are read server-side from the module record.
Replaced raw cURL with HttpFactory; TLS certificate verification is now always on.
SQL in the module-lookup fallback now uses bound parameters and quoteName().
All review fields are HTML-escaped on output; profile photo and author URLs are validated to use http(s) schemes.

change.item: Removed the unused "secret" field from the module parameters (breaking: existing installs simply ignore the stale value).
Helper API split into loadRaw / present / refreshFromGoogle. Cache files no longer overwritten with a filtered subset on every refresh.
Admin refresh now returns clean JSON feedback and reports Google Places API errors instead of treating empty or rejected responses as successful updates.
